calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Patrick J. Heard, CSR#11055. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-04-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing on Cross-Complaint.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
No appearance by the Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant: Eicon Inc., a California corporation.
Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq. for Defendant and Cross-Plaintiff: Soka Gakkai International-USA, a California not for profit religious corporation.
Witness: David Eisenberg and Clayton Massey, were sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit A- SGI/Eicon contract----ID/EVID.
Exhibit B- SGI/Eicon Contract----ID/EVID.
Exhibit C- Inspection Record-----ID/EVID.
Exhibit D- "Return to Work" Agreemtn----ID only.
Exhibit E- Disbursement report---ID/EVID.
Exhibit F- SGI Expert Report-----ID/EVID.
Exhibit G- Prime Construction contract----ID/EVID.
Exhibit H- Cancelled Checks (3)----ID/EVID.
Exhibit I- Dimissal of CCSF vs SGI----ID/EVID.
Exhibit J- Print out from C.S.L.B.----ID/EVID.
Exhibit K- Copy of Court's Notice for Trial---ID/EVID.
Exhibit L- 3 Photos and 2 Post Cards----ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Cross-Plaintiff and against the Cross-Defendants as follows:
Principal $1,660,862.52.
Attorney's Fees $450,000.00,
Costs $375.00, for a Total of $2,111,237.52
As to Complaint by Plaintiff Eicon Inc., Plaintiff take nothing from Defendant, the Mechanic's Lien DOC 2006-I134-740 and 741 recorded by Plaintiff shall be released.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.
Settlement reached with the non appearance Cross-Defendants: Surety Company of the Pacific and American Contractors Indemnity Company, matter is placed on the CRC 3.1385 dismissal calendar in Dept. 212 on Dec. 4, 2007 at 10 A.M.

Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Assigned To Trial Court
